sub_pixel_system.notes: Space flight simulation; sub-pixel movement system not documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Space Flight Simulation
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots a spacecraft in zero-gravity environment, engaging in dogfight combat against enemy ships. Movement is not bound by traditional platformer physics.

special_mechanics.name: Wingman AI System
special_mechanics.description: AI-controlled wingman accompanies player and can be given orders during missions. Wingmen can be permanently killed in combat.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Space flight simulation game. Available documentation is gameplay-focused (missions, story, AI wingmen) with no specific physics parameters documented. Movement mechanics are spacecraft-based rather than character-based platformer mechanics. No sub-pixel movement, gravity values, or jump physics applicable to this genre.
